## Hasil Keadaan $|\phi_1(\alpha_i,\alpha_j)\rangle$
<div style="max-height: 500px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid #ddd; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <table style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.75em;">
    <thead style="position: sticky; top: 0; background-color: white; z-index: 1;">
      <!-- Baris Judul Kolom Utama -->
      <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555; background-color: #f7f7f7;">
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">Variasi x</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/12 & π/12</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/12 & π/2</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/2 & π/12</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/2 & π/2</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody style="font-weight: bold;">
      <!-- Baris data diulang berdasarkan pola warna -->
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 1</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 2</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 3</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 4</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 5</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 6</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 7</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 8</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 9</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 10</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 11</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 12</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 13</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 14</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 15</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 16</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 17</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 18</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 19</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 20</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 21</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 22</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 23</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 24</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 25</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 26</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 27</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 28</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 29</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #a1dab4; color: black;">A-BC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 30</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

## Hasil Keadaan $|\phi_2(\alpha_i,\alpha_j)\rangle$
<div style="max-height: 500px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid #ddd; font-family: sans-serif;">
  <table style="border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; text-align: center; font-size: 0.75em;">
    <thead style="position: sticky; top: 0; background-color: white; z-index: 1;">
      <!-- Baris Judul Kolom Utama -->
      <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555; background-color: #f7f7f7;">
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold; text-align: left;">Variasi x</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/12 & π/12</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/12 & π/2</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/2 & π/12</th>
        <th style="padding: 10px; font-weight: bold;">π/2 & π/2</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody style="font-weight: bold;">
      <!-- Baris data diulang berdasarkan pola warna -->
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 1</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 2</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 3</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 4</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 5</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 6</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 7</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 8</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 9</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 10</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 11</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 12</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 13</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 14</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 15</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 16</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 17</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 18</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 19</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 20</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 21</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 22</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #41b6c4; color: black;">C-AB</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 23</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 24</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 25</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 26</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 27</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 28</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 29</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #555;"><td style="padding: 6px; text-align: left; background-color: #fdfdfd;">Variasi 30</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #225ea8; color: white;">ABC</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td><td style="background-color: #e0e0e0; color: #555;">A-B-C</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
